creator: bkoenig@alpha-tierchen.de
text:
This shell archive contains a new updated version of the very out-dated and maintainer-less port java/sablevm. In fact this is not only an update, but rather a reworked version of this port with the following main features:

- split the port into java/sablevm and java/sablevm-classpath which allows better maintainability regarding dependencies and options
- add options, e.g. build without manual pages or without gtk+ support

I also like to take over the maintainership.

The gzip'ed shell archive contains the new version of both ports. If you want a diff patch against the old port then send me an e-mail.

By the way, it is necessary to add CONFLICTS= sablevm-* to the java/classpath port.
